title: Bruges, West Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bruges, West Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bruges is a city in West Flanders with a population of 118,000. A fairy-tale medieval city of cobblestone streets, picturesque canals, and well-preserved architecture, often called the Venice of the North.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
